notes: Windows catches up to the Mac: the beta is now the FULL app (Pro unlocked during your 30-day window, which starts at your first launch), Split sessions, working blink culling (its AI model finally ships in the bundle), honest conversion counts and cancel reporting, and a first-launch DNG Converter setup prompt.
notes_mac: Full-software audit release: 18 fixes. Blink detection now actually works (its AI model was never bundled), filename collisions no longer lose keepers, conversion results are counted honestly, cancel is honest everywhere, the free-disk guard works again, and Mac card-reader junk files are ignored.
